title: AXChartLegendOptions
description: Legend configuration options for customizing legend appearance and behavior

props.name: showValues
props.description: Whether to show values in legend items

props.name: showPercentage
props.description: Whether to show percentage values in legend items

props.name: className
props.description: Custom CSS class name for the legend container

props.name: interactive
props.description: Whether the legend items are interactive

sections.title: Interface Definition
sections.description: Canonical interface definition from source code
